title: Create Train Additions
description: A mod which adds some deco things for the create trains and real looking signals for the create signals
body:
Create Train Additions

 

The Create Train Additions mod adds many deco blocks for the create mod and lets users build more realistic looking trains, train stations (with the new update) and signals systems (watch below). All items and blocks in the mod can be crafted in survival and mechanics like rost to metal poles are also included. The mod already exists on Curseforge and now also here! to report bugs or submit suggestions to the mod you can join the discord and discuss or chat with 800+ other members!
